chatbot.welcome: Barka da zuwa Powerton Engineering! Yaya zan iya taimaka muku a yau?
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Barka da zuwa Powerton Engineering! Yaya zan iya taimaka muku a yau?

options.sensorsCategory: 🌡️ Na'urori masu auna zafi & Masu watsawa
options.regularBusinessHours: ⏰ Lokacin Aiki na yau da kullun
options.backToProductsMenu: 🔙 Komawa zuwa Menu na Kayan aiki

responses.products: Muna ba da cikakken kewayon kayayyakin sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, kayan aiki, tsarin hasken rana, da ƙari. Waɗanne takamaiman kayayyaki kuke nema?
responses.services: Ayyukanmu sun haɗa da shigarwa, gyara, daidaitawa, tallafin fasaha, da mafita na al'ada. Wanne sabis ne ke sha'awar ku?
responses.contact: Kuna iya isa gare mu a +91-94627-71662 ko aiko mana da imel a info@powertonengineering.com. Hedkwatar mu tana cikin Noida, Indiya, kuma muna hidimar abokan ciniki a duk duniya.
responses.quote: Zan so in taimaka muku samun bayani! Da fatan za a ziyarci shafinmu na bayani ko ku ba ni buƙatunku.
responses.support: Ƙungiyarmu ta tallafin fasaha tana nan don taimakawa! Da fatan za a bayyana tambayar fasaha ko matsalar ku.
responses.productSelection: Yayi kyau! Muna da kewayon kayayyakin masana'antu da yawa a cikin nau'ikan da yawa. Wanne nau'in ya fi sha'awar ku?
responses.serviceSelection: Muna ba da cikakkun ayyukan injiniya don tallafawa ayyukanku daga farawa zuwa ƙare. Wane sabis ne za mu iya taimaka muku da shi?
responses.troubleshootingMain: Ina nan don taimaka muku gyara matsalolin fasaha. Wace irin matsala kuke fuskanta?
responses.companyInfo: Powerton Engineering babban kamfani ne na sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki tare da ƙwarewar shekaru 15+. Muna hidimar abokan ciniki a duk duniya tare da cikakkun mafita.
responses.sensorsCategory: Kewayon na'urori masu auna zafi da kayan aikinmu sun haɗa da na'urori masu auna daidaito don aikace-aikacen masana'antu. Wace irin fahimta kuke buƙata?
responses.electricalCategory: Muna samar da cikakkun kayan lantarki don aikace-aikacen masana'antu ciki har da rarraba wutar lantarki, sarrafawa, da kayan kariya. Waɗanne kayan lantarki kuke buƙata?
responses.automationCategory: Magani na sarrafa kansa ya haɗa da PLCs, SCADA, DCS, da tsarin HMI don cikakken sarrafa masana'antu. Wace ƙalubalen sarrafa kansa za mu iya warware muku?
responses.solarCategory: Muna ba da cikakkun mafita na hasken rana daga bangarori zuwa shigarwa da gyara. Wane aikin hasken rana kuke shirin yi?
responses.safetyCategory: Tsaro yana da mahimmanci a cikin aikace-aikacen masana'antu. Muna ba da cikakken kewayon kayan kariya da tsaro. Waɗanne kayan tsaro kuke buƙata?
responses.installationService: Ƙungiyoyinmu na shigarwa na ƙwararru suna tabbatar da ingantaccen saiti da aiki na tsarin masana'antu. Wane kayan aiki ne ke buƙatar shigarwa?
responses.electricalTroubleshooting: Zan iya taimakawa wajen gano matsalolin lantarki. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da gazawar samar da wutar lantarki, tafiyar kariyar kewayawa, da matsalolin ƙasa. Waɗanne alamomi kuke fuskanta?
responses.sensorTroubleshooting: Matsalolin na'ura mai auna zafi na iya shafar daidaiton aunawa. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da ɓarkewar daidaitawa, tsangwama na sigina, da abubuwan muhalli. Wace matsalar na'ura mai auna zafi kuke fuskanta?
responses.automationSearch: Zan iya taimaka muku nemo cikakkiyar mafita ta sarrafa kansa! Kewayonmu ya haɗa da PLCs, tsarin SCADA, hanyoyin HMI, da cikakkun fakitin sarrafawa.
responses.solarSearch: Madalla! Maganin hasken rana ya haɗa da cikakken tsarin tsarin, shigarwa, da sabis na gyara don aikace-aikacen gidaje, kasuwanci, da masana'antu.
responses.mechanicalSearch: Babban zaɓi! Muna ba da cikakken kewayon motoci, famfo, bawul, da kayan aikin injiniya don aikace-aikacen masana'antu daban-daban.
responses.serviceSearch: Cikakke! Ayyukanmu sun haɗa da daidaitawa, shirye-shiryen gyara, tallafin gaggawa, da cikakkun mafita na horo.
responses.contactSearch: Ga duk hanyoyin da za ku iya isa gare mu! Muna samuwa ta hanyoyi da yawa don sauƙin ku.
responses.powerSupplyHelp: Matsalolin samar da wutar lantarki na iya zama masu mahimmanci. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da sauyin wutar lantarki, yawan lodin wutar lantarki, murdiya mai jituwa, da gazawar kayan aiki. Bari in taimake ku nemo madaidaicin bayani.
responses.temperatureSensorHelp: Daidaitaccen aunawa mai zafi yana da mahimmanci don sarrafa tsari. Batutuwa galibi suna haɗawa da ɓarkewar daidaitawa, tsangwama na muhalli, ko tsufa na na'ura mai auna zafi. Ga yadda za mu iya taimakawa.
responses.plcTroubleshooting: Matsalolin PLC na iya dakatar da samarwa. Matsaloli na yau da kullun sun haɗa da kurakurai na shirye-shirye, gazawar I/O, kurakuran sadarwa, da batutuwan samar da wutar lantarki. Bari mu dawo da tsarin ku kan layi.
responses.solarPerformanceHelp: Matsalolin aikin tsarin hasken rana na iya shafar samar da makamashi sosai. Abubuwan da ke haifar da yawa sun haɗa da kurakuran inverter, lalacewar panel, shading, da gazawar tsarin sa ido.

chatbotMessages.quoteHelp: Zan so in taimaka muku samun bayani na musamman! Farashinmu yana da gasa da gaskiya. Don daidaitaccen farashi, muna buƙatar fahimtar takamaiman buƙatunku. Bari mu haɗa ku da ƙungiyar tallace-tallace don tattaunawa dalla-dalla.
chatbotMessages.helpAssist: Ina nan don taimaka muku a kowane mataki na hanya! Ko kuna buƙatar jagorar zaɓin samfur, ƙayyadaddun fasaha, tallafin sabis, ko kuma kawai kuna son ƙarin koyo game da kamfaninmu, ina nan don yi muku hidima. Da menene kuke son taimako?
chatbotMessages.businessHoursInfo: Muna nan lokacin da kuke buƙatar mu! Lokacin aiki na mu shine Litinin zuwa Asabar: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM. Hakanan muna ba da tallafin gaggawa a ranakun Lahadi don mahimman yanayi. Wanda yake a Noida, Sector 6, F-25, F Block (metro mafi kusa: Sector 15).
chatbotMessages.pricingInfo: Farashinmu yana da gasa da gaskiya koyaushe! Mun yi imanin samar da ƙima don kuɗi ba tare da ɓoyayyun farashi ba. Farashi ya dogara da ƙayyadaddun bayanai, yawa, da girman aikin. Don mafi daidaitaccen bayani, ƙungiyarmu za ta kimanta takamaiman buƙatunku.
chatbotMessages.achievements: Muna alfahari da nasarorinmu! An kammala ayyuka sama da 500+, abokan ciniki sama da 50, ƙwarewar shekaru 15+, da haɗin gwiwa tare da shugabannin masana'antu kamar Thermax, Motherson, da Praj Industries. Aikinmu na shuka hasken rana na 10MW da tsarin sarrafa magunguna na cikin manyan nasarorinmu.
chatbotMessages.mainMenu: Barka da dawowa babban menu! Ina nan don taimaka muku da duk wata buƙatar sarrafa masana'antu. Ko kuna neman kayayyaki, ayyuka, tallafin fasaha, ko bayanin kamfani, zan jagorance ku zuwa madaidaicin bayani. Da me zan iya taimaka muku?
chatbotMessages.urgentSupport: Batutuwa masu gaggawa sun haɗa da: gazawar kayan aiki da ke shafar samarwa, batutuwan da suka shafi tsaro, rugujewar gaggawa, ƙayyadaddun lokacin shigarwa, da rashin aiki na tsarin. Don waɗannan yanayi, kira mu nan da nan a +91-94627-71662. Muna ba da tallafin gaggawa na 24/7 don mahimman yanayi.
chatbotMessages.productComparison: Zan iya taimaka muku kwatanta kayayyaki! Kewayonmu mai yawa ya haɗa da na'urori masu auna zafi, tsarin sarrafa kansa, kayan lantarki, da kayayyakin hasken rana. Faɗa mani waɗanne takamaiman kayayyaki kuke kwatanta ko kuma wane aikace-aikace kuke buƙata su, kuma zan jagorance ku zuwa mafi kyawun zaɓuɓɓuka.
chatbotMessages.quoteTips: Ga wasu nasihu don samun mafi kyawun bayani: 1) Bayar da cikakkun bayanai da buƙatu, 2) Ambaci adadin da ake buƙata, 3) Haɗa da jadawalin aikin, 4) Ƙayyade wurin shigarwa, 5) Lissafa kowane buƙatu na musamman ko takaddun shaida da ake buƙata. Ƙarin cikakkun bayanai da kuka bayar, mafi daidaiton bayaninmu zai kasance!
chatbotMessages.defaultResponse: Na gode da tuntubar mu! Ina nan don taimaka muku nemo cikakkiyar mafita ta sarrafa masana'antu. A Powerton Engineering, mun yi imanin cewa kowane abokin ciniki ya cancanci kulawa ta musamman da jagora na ƙwararru. Wace takamaiman ƙalubale ko buƙata zan iya taimaka muku da ita a yau?
chatbotMessages.productsPageResponse: Cikakke! Na kai ku shafinmu na kayayyaki inda zaku iya bincika fa'idar mafita na sarrafa masana'antu. Za ku sami cikakkun bayanai, hotuna, da bayanan fasaha don kowane nau'in samfur. Kuna buƙatar taimako don nemo wani abu na musamman ko kuna da tambayoyi game da kowane samfur?
chatbotMessages.servicesPageResponse: Zaɓi mai kyau! Shafinmu na ayyuka yana nuna cikakkun ayyukan tallafi daga shigarwa zuwa gyare-gyare. Mu ne cikakken abokin injiniya don duk tsawon rayuwar aikin. Wane irin tallafin sabis kuke nema?
chatbotMessages.contactPageResponse: Yayi kyau! Shafin tuntuɓar yana da duk bayananmu gami da wurin ofis, lambobin waya, da fom ɗin tuntuɓar. Muna cikin Noida kuma muna nan Litinin-Asabar. Jin kyauta don tuntuɓar kowane lokaci! Akwai wani abu na musamman da kuke son tattaunawa da ƙungiyarmu?
chatbotMessages.aboutPageResponse: Abin ban mamaki! Shafinmu game da mu yana ba da cikakken labarin Powerton Engineering - tafiyarmu, nasarorinmu, ƙungiyarmu, da ƙimarmu. Tare da ƙwarewar shekaru 15+ da ayyuka masu nasara 500+, muna alfahari da ƙwarewarmu ta injiniya. Kuna son ƙarin sani game da wani takamaiman al'amari?
chatbotMessages.projectsPageResponse: Mai ban mamaki! Shafinmu na ayyuka yana nuna fayil ɗinmu na nasarar aiwatarwa a masana'antu daban-daban. Daga tsire-tsire masu amfani da hasken rana na 10MW zuwa tsarin sarrafa magunguna, kowane aiki yana nuna ƙwarewarmu ta fasaha. Kuna sha'awar aikin kama?
chatbotMessages.quotePageResponse: Cikakke! Shafinmu na bayani zai taimaka muku samun cikakken shawara wanda aka keɓance don takamaiman buƙatunku. Ƙungiyarmu za ta bincika bukatunku kuma ta ba da farashi mai gasa tare da sharuɗɗa masu haske. Wane irin mafita kuke nema don bayani?
chatbotMessages.genericPageResponse: Na jagorance ku zuwa shafin da aka nema. Kuna iya samun duk bayanan da suka dace a can. Jin kyauta don bincika kuma ku sanar da ni idan kuna buƙatar kowane taimako ko kuna da tambayoyi game da abin da kuka samu!
chatbotMessages.callInitiated: Na fara kiran a gare ku! Ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararru tana tsaye don ba da taimako nan take. Idan kiran bai haɗu ba, zaku iya isa gare mu ta imel ko ziyarci ofishinmu. Ta yaya zan iya taimaka muku a yau?
chatbotMessages.emailOpened: Na buɗe abokin ciniki na imel ɗin ku tare da adireshinmu da aka riga aka cika! Da fatan za a bayyana buƙatunku dalla-dalla, kuma ƙungiyarmu za ta amsa cikin awanni 24. Don al'amura masu gaggawa, kiran mu kai tsaye ya fi sauri. Me kuma zan iya taimaka muku da shi?
chatbotMessages.externalResourceOpened: Na buɗe muku hanyar waje! Kuna iya bincika ƙarin bayanan a can. Lokacin da kuka shirya don ci gaba da tattaunawarmu ko kuna buƙatar ƙarin taimako, ina nan don taimakawa. Me kuke so ku yi na gaba?
chatbotMessages.actionCompleted: An kammala aikin! Ina nan don ci gaba da taimaka muku da duk wata tambaya ko buƙatu da kuke da ita. Me kuke so ku bincika na gaba?

welcomeMessage: Sannu! Ni ne Mashawarcin Injiniyan ku. Ina nan don taimaka muku nemo madaidaicin mafita na sarrafa masana'antu, amsa tambayoyin fasaha, da jagorantar ku ta cikin kayayyakinmu da ayyukanmu. Yaya zan iya taimaka muku a yau?

responses.electricalCategory: Madalla! An ƙera kayan aikin lantarki don aminci da aminci a cikin yanayin masana'antu. Wace irin kayan lantarki kuke nema?
responses.automationCategory: Cikakke! Tsarin sarrafa kansa da sarrafawa yana taimakawa wajen daidaita ayyuka da inganta inganci. Wace irin mafita ta sarrafa kansa kuke buƙata?
responses.solarCategory: Abin mamaki! Maganin makamashin hasken rana yana ƙara zama mahimmanci don ayyukan dorewa. Waɗanne kayayyakin hasken rana kuke sha'awar?
responses.electricalTroubleshooting: Zan taimaka muku gano matsalolin lantarki mataki-mataki. Wace takamaiman matsalar lantarki kuke fuskanta?
responses.sensorTroubleshooting: Matsalolin na'ura mai auna zafi na iya shafar daidaiton aunawa. Bari in taimake ku gano da warware matsalar. Wace irin matsalar na'ura mai auna zafi kuke fuskanta?
responses.controlTroubleshooting: Matsalolin tsarin sarrafawa na iya shafar duk aikin ku. Zan taimake ku warware matsalar a hankali. Wace matsalar tsarin sarrafawa kuke fuskanta?
responses.contactSearch: Ina farin cikin taimaka muku tuntuɓar ƙungiyarmu! Ga mafi kyawun hanyoyin da za ku iya isa gare mu:

messages.engineeringAdvisor: Mai Ba da Shawara na Injiniya

placeholders.askChatbot: Tambaye ni game da kayayyaki, ayyuka, ko tallafin fasaha...
